messages.content:
✅ (b) 保留 v2.8 branch 确认 broadcast 团队. v2.8 branch (intermediate working state at 17bdc0e) + v2.8 tag (immutable d92a211, release-canonical) coexist. Institutional discipline: verify tag content 必用 `refs/tags/v2.8` explicit (避免 bare ambiguity), 团队已应用.

v2.8 周期正式 close. Standing by v2.9 epic schedule.
